neighborhoods.name: Rhodes Medieval Old Town
neighborhoods.description: Largest inhabited medieval town in Europe with Knights' Quarter, Ottoman mosques, and labyrinthine streets
neighborhoods.character: Medieval UNESCO, living museum, tourist hub

housing.predominantType: Apartments in medieval and Ottoman-era buildings

neighborhoods.character_notes: The historic and commercial heart of Rhodes Town. Most walkable area with best access to cultural attractions, restaurants, and public services.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living Rhodes Town

neighborhoods.name: Ixia / Ialyssos
neighborhoods.description: Western coastal area with modern hotels, residential neighborhoods, and sunset views over Turkey
neighborhoods.character: Coastal suburban, modern amenities, sunset views

housing.predominantType: Modern apartments, houses, and resort-style properties

neighborhoods.character_notes: Established residential area offering a quieter lifestyle while maintaining reasonable access to Rhodes Town's center and services.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living Rhodes Town

neighborhoods.name: Afantou
neighborhoods.description: Inland village with agricultural character, golf course, and significantly lower costs
neighborhoods.character_notes: More affordable option for budget-conscious retirees. May require a car or longer transit times to reach central amenities.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living Rhodes Town

neighborhoods.name: Lindos Area
neighborhoods.description: Famous white-washed village below an ancient acropolis, popular with international residents and artists

housing.predominantType: Restored captain houses and white-washed apartments

neighborhoods.character_notes: Area with established international community and expat-oriented services. English is more commonly spoken here than in other neighborhoods.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living Rhodes Town
